violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per person in charge, parts were ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The ware-washing area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by live rodent seen and droppings observed in storage/construction room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2025
Inspector observed construction supplies and equipment being stored near and on pizza boxes. PIC informed to relocate all construction items. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2025

The ceiling in the front and rear areas and wall, door thresholds are in poor repair. Inspector observed missing panels, openings and exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
